title: springy herbal mexican dinner tacos
description: A flavorful and refreshing ovo-vegetarian taco recipe featuring a miso-based marinade, crunchy pickles, and fresh herbs. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the tofu to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the garlic, cumin, coriander, chili powder, and salt. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced pickled jalape5 peppers and cook for another minute.
Stir in the miso paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until combined.
Add the cooked tofu back into the skillet and stir to coat with the miso marinade.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Warm tacos shells according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few pieces of the tofu mixture onto a shell, followed by some chopped cilantro, a squeeze of lime juice, and a sprinkle of salt.
Garnish with additional pickled jalape5 peppers, if desired.
